message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.filter (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.filter (boolean-
mask selection):

- filter_mostly_true (4-elem data, mask drops one)
- filter_all_true (no-op selection)
- filter_all_false (empty result)

Each test builds both the data Series (left) and the boolean-mask
Series (right), queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which evaluates
data[mask]), runs series.filter(&mask), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesFilter was already wired in
FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-ivz2a]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
